function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written. I found the Family Map Wall project with start date 2026-05-05, but I could not find a canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record in the project lane, so I cannot verify whether it started earlier or identify a uniquely supported 'earliest project' to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow and deletion workflow: process lowest inbox item, verify against canonical lanes, and do not delete when evidence does not uniquely support a target.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical project evidence exists for Family Map Wall (README in /40_projects/2026_05_05_family_map_wall), but no canonical BlueMesa Quotebook project record was found in the project lane, so the requested comparison and deletion would require guessing. Deletion workflow forbids that.
